data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that weather conditions (temperature, precipitation, wind) are auto-captured. While the linked use case mentions that weather was 'auto-logged: 68°F, clear', there is no evidence provided that confirms the capture of all required weather conditions, specifically precipitation and wind. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not fully satisfy the stated requirement.
gaps: Missing evidence of precipitation and wind capture.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
